    O

    OrderBLL - Class in businessLayer
    Order contains methods to place an order.
    OrderBLL() - Constructor for class businessLayer.OrderBLL
     
    OrderDAO - Class in dataAccessLayer
    Class that extends AbstractDAO class, so it can execute CRUD operations in the database with Orders.
    OrderDAO() - Constructor for class dataAccessLayer.OrderDAO
     
    OrderPanel - Class in presentation
    OrderPanel gets displayed when the user presses the Place an order button in the SidePanel.
    OrderPanel() - Constructor for class presentation.OrderPanel
     
    OrderPanel(List<Client>, List<Product>) - Constructor for class presentation.OrderPanel
     
    OrderProduct - Class in model
    Model class tha contains necessary information about order-product connections.
    OrderProduct() - Constructor for class model.OrderProduct
     
    OrderProduct(int, int, int) - Constructor for class model.OrderProduct
     
    OrderProductDAO - Class in dataAccessLayer
    Class that extends AbstractDAO class, so it can execute CRUD operations in the database with OrderProducts.
    OrderProductDAO() - Constructor for class dataAccessLayer.OrderProductDAO
     
    Orders - Class in model
     
    Orders() - Constructor for class model.Orders
    Model class tha contains necessary information about orders.
    Orders(int, int, String, String, String, int) - Constructor for class model.Orders
     
    Orders(int, String, String, String, int) - Constructor for class model.Orders
     
    org.example - package org.example
